description_long: This lighthouse features a tall, tapered cylindrical tower with alternating red and white horizontal stripes, giving it a classic maritime appearance. The structure is capped with a red polygonal roof, beneath which sits a lantern room encircled by a gallery balcony. The base of the tower is faceted and slightly flared, with a small arched entryway visible on one side. The lantern room is enclosed by transparent panels, suggesting the presence of a light beacon within. The overall design is utilitarian yet iconic, with clean geometric lines and a bold color scheme that ensures high visibility in coastal or urban settings.
description: A tall, red-and-white striped lighthouse with a polygonal red roof, lantern room, and gallery balcony, featuring a flared base and arched entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched entryway at the base and the full height of the striped tower.
description_view_1: Side view with the stripes and polygonal roof visible, but the entryway is not in sight.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the continuous striped pattern and the flared base, with no entryway visible.
description_view_3: Another side view similar to view 1, showing the stripes and polygonal roof, without the entryway.
